name: Cold Crabmeat Nacho
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Black olives, finely chopped (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
The best way to prepare this recipe in a food processor, because it chops the ingredients finely enough and blends them together for you. But if a food processor is not handy, you can use a blender and a chef's knife. It will still come out great, no matter how you do it!
1. Mix the cream cheese until it reaches a pasty consistency.
2. In a large mixing bowl, whip together the cream cheese and mayonnaise until the mixture is smooth.
3. Add the Tabasco, minced onions, celery, seasonings, finely chopped black olives, and crabmeat to the bowl. Gently blend all ingredients together.
To serve:
1. Lay out the entire bag of Doritos on a pizza pan.
2. Stuff each chip heaping with the crabmeat mixture.
3. Sprinkle paprika on top of each stuffed chip.
4. Refrigerate for an hour or two to enhance the flavor.
